summary: Review the full multi-agent harness guide documentation and report evaluation plus improvement points
next_action: read all guide documents and assess consistency, completeness, and operational risks

summary: Reviewed the multi-agent harness documentation and identified priority improvements

details.overall_assessment: The system is usable and coherent at the architecture level, but several operational rules need tightening before heavy multi-agent use.
priority_findings: Resolve precedence between TASK_CREATED-first and session reentry gate-first rules.
Align Analyst tool permissions with required audit/logging responsibilities.
Clarify Tier 1 branch behavior versus Generator branch requirements.
Separate task status, notification status, and severity enums.
Define persistent Task Spec storage and quality score recording policy.
